tools.name: Filesystem
tools.description: Read, write, list and search files inside the repository working tree.

tools.name: Git
tools.description: Inspect and mutate local git state (status, diff, add, commit, branch).

tools.name: GitHub
tools.description: Interact with GitHub (issues, pull requests) via the gh CLI when available.

tools.name: Terminal
tools.description: Execute an allow-listed shell command with a timeout.

tools.name: Docker
tools.description: Run containerized commands (build, run, exec) via the docker CLI.

tools.name: Database
tools.description: Run a parameterized query against a configured database connection string via CLI adapters (psql/mysql/sqlite3).

tools.name: MCP Server Bridge
tools.description: Invoke a tool exposed by a configured Model Context Protocol server. Servers are registered in config/mcp-servers.json (empty by default) — this tool becomes plug-and-play the moment one is added.
